into_the_wild.name: Ocean Beach
into_the_wild.description: A beautiful coastal spot in San Francisco known for its expansive sandy shores and scenic views. Popular for gathering and experiencing the serene ocean vibes.

into_the_wild.name: Golden Gate Park
into_the_wild.description: One of San Francisco's iconic green spaces featuring diverse landscapes and recreational opportunities. A must-visit destination offering beautiful scenery and outdoor activities.

into_the_wild.name: Outer Sunset
into_the_wild.description: A picturesque neighborhood known for stunning sunset views and serene, beautiful vibes. Perfect for watching sunsets and enjoying peaceful natural scenery.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Golden Gate Bridge
gram_worthy_spots.description: San Francisco's most iconic landmark offering spectacular photo opportunities. A classic viewpoint that provides stunning vistas of the bridge and bay.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Inner Sunset
gram_worthy_spots.description: A charming neighborhood known for picturesque rainbow views and beautiful natural lighting conditions. A great spot for photography and enjoying serene sunset moments.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Chinatown
gram_worthy_spots.description: A vibrant historic district featuring colorful streets, cultural architecture, and photogenic urban scenes. A popular destination for capturing authentic San Francisco character.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Mission District
off_the_beaten_path.description: A culturally rich neighborhood in San Francisco known for its unique character and local atmosphere. Offers an authentic experience of the city's diverse community.
